metadata.description: Solo Dev Toolbox: multi-agent plugins for the full startup lifecycle from idea to deployed product

plugins.name: idea-spark
plugins.description: Validate and refine business ideas through multi-agent market research, competitive analysis, revenue modeling, and feasibility assessment

plugins.name: stack-pick
plugins.description: Research and recommend optimal tech stacks through multi-agent evaluation of backend frameworks, frontend tools, infrastructure, and developer experience

plugins.name: codebase-ideation
plugins.description: Multi-agent codebase scanner that discovers actionable improvement ideas across Code, Security, Performance, Docs, UX, and dynamically detected categories with competitive market research

plugins.name: codebase-roadmap
plugins.description: Multi-agent roadmap generator that analyzes codebases by domain (backend, frontend, infra, security) with market research to produce phased roadmaps with dependency tracking

plugins.name: scaffold-kit
plugins.description: Bootstrap project skeletons from tech stack decisions with directory structure, CI/CD pipelines, Docker configs, linting, and documentation scaffolding

plugins.name: build-engine
plugins.description: Implement roadmap milestones feature-by-feature using TDD multi-agent coding with planning, test-first development, implementation, and code review

plugins.name: launch-check
plugins.description: Production readiness audit with 50+ checks across security, ops, reliability, and documentation producing a GO/NO-GO scorecard

plugins.name: codebase-autopsy
plugins.description: Deep tech debt analysis with risk-scored time bombs, complexity mapping, pattern archaeology, and prioritized refactoring recommendations

plugins.name: cost-forecast
plugins.description: Estimate infrastructure and API costs at different user scales with cost cliff identification, optimization recommendations, and burn rate projections

plugins.name: onboard-gen
plugins.description: Generate contributor documentation and architecture walkthroughs by scanning your codebase for structure, flows, setup requirements, and coding conventions

plugins.name: test-gap
plugins.description: Find untested critical paths and generate test strategies with risk-ranked coverage maps and optional skeleton test files

plugins.name: dep-doctor
plugins.description: Dependency health audit with CVE scanning, freshness checks, license auditing, and bloat detection producing actionable upgrade/replace/remove recommendations

plugins.name: incident-planner
plugins.description: Generate runbooks and incident response playbooks from architecture analysis with failure mode identification and severity classification

plugins.name: scale-sim
plugins.description: Identify scaling bottlenecks before they hit production with bottleneck hunting, database profiling, queue analysis, and capacity modeling at 10x/100x/1000x
